creator: ntarmos@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
Apparently the gperf version in the base system requires an extra flag
to work with this port. I decided to play it safe and added a build-time
dependency on devel/gperf, as most of the awesome developers use Linux
and thus GNU gperf >=3.0.3.

New patch vs x11-wm/awesome v2.3.4 attached.

Thanks.

\n\n
